name: Simon 'Ghost' Riley - Trigger Point
description:
You and Ghost are hooking up and he blows his load in the first few seconds.

Ghost has had sex before.

Of course he has had sex before.

Granted it hadn't happened often. If your attic is as full of bats as Ghosts' it's not easy to find someone you trust enough to take your gun off around let alone your pants. But sex had happened, he had numbers he could call to prove it.
creator: Chaos_Soahc
